summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NEXUS AI Social Marketplace. Backend APIs working excellently (97.1% success rate). Frontend navigation and core functionality working well with minor UI issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: eBook generation timed out after 30 seconds
flaky_endpoints.impact: Long AI content generation may timeout

ui_bugs.issue: Chat button click blocked by Emergent badge overlay
Shows blank screen instead of sign-in prompt when not authenticated

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero, stats, features, AI agents section
User Registration and Login pages work
Marketplace page shows products with search and filters
Studio page with AI content generation tabs
Social Feed shows posts with interaction buttons
AI Agents dashboard shows 5+ agents with status
Backend products, posts, vendors, spotlight APIs
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI Chat widget overlay issue (Emergent badge blocking clicks) and Vendor page blank screen when not authenticated. Consider adding z-index fix for chat widget and proper authentication check for vendor page.
